karina.name: Karina Moreno Diaz
karina.summary: Junior Information Systems Engineering student with hands-on experience in frontend development using React and TypeScript. Strong foundation in system analysis, data modeling, and user-centered design. Focused on building clean, functional, and intuitive web applications using modern development practices.

experience.summary: Collaborated in the analysis and proposal of an information management solution for a real nursing home environment.
highlights: Evaluated manual operational workflows and identified improvement opportunities in resident and staff data management.
Structured relational data models to organize operational information in a scalable and consistent way.
Defined functional requirements and translated business needs into technical documentation.
Designed simplified user flows tailored to non-technical staff.
Applied usability principles to improve clarity and reduce operational friction.

education.degree: Bachelor’s Degree in Information Systems Engineering

daniel.name: Daniel Nuez
daniel.summary: I focus on database modeling and implementation, requirements analysis, and backend development to build stable, scalable, and business-oriented solutions. I am interested in designing structures and processes that ensure data is managed correctly, consistently, and securely.

experience.role: Database Analysis and Backend Design Project
experience.summary: Participated in the analysis of requirements and the design of a data-focused solution to improve information management in a real nursing home environment.
highlights: Analyzed operational needs and identified opportunities to improve how resident, staff, and administrative data are managed.
Proposed relational database structures to support consistent, organized, and scalable information management.
Translated business and operational requirements into technical specifications for backend and data management processes.
Defined entities, relationships, and key data flows to ensure integrity and clarity in the system design.
Contributed to solution proposals aimed at improving data accuracy, accessibility, and overall process efficiency.
